captions: indie rock, jangly guitars, driving drums, raw vocals, lo-fi warmth, garage energy, melodic hooks, anthemic
alternative rock, heavy distortion, powerful drums, emotional singing, dynamic quiet-loud shifts, grunge influence
post-punk revival, angular guitar riffs, tight bass, urgent vocals, dark energy, new wave synths, danceable rock
classic rock, bluesy guitar solo, pounding drums, raspy vocals, arena-ready, powerful riffs, stadium anthem
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Burning through the static on a dead-end road
Every sign is broken but I'm in the zone
Turn the amplifier up until it bleeds
This is all I've got and all I'll ever need

[Chorus]
We're not gonna fade away
We're not gonna play it safe
Light the fuse and watch it blow
This is everything we know

[Verse 2]
Midnight in the basement with the volume high
Neighbors calling cops but we don't care why
Every broken string is just another scar
We're not here to be perfect, just to go too far

[Chorus]
We're not gonna fade away
We're not gonna play it safe
Light the fuse and watch it blow
This is everything we know

[Bridge]
Louder, louder, louder
Until the walls come down

[Outro]
We're not gonna fade away
Not today
